title: Restore 'Get to Know Me' section format to previous draft

requirements.text: Restore the 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' (Get to Know Me) section on the About page (AboutPage.tsx) to match the layout, typography, spacing, and visual formatting it had in the draft prior to Draft 177. This includes restoring any card layout, heading styles, text formatting, section padding/margins, and any decorative elements that were present before the most recent changes.

quotes: Das Format von "Lernen Sie mich kennen" muss wie im vorherigen Entwurf sein.

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' section visually matches the layout and styling from the draft before Draft 177.
Heading style, typography, spacing, and any card or container formatting are restored.
The section content (text, structure) remains intact — only formatting is reverted.
No other sections on AboutPage.tsx are affected by this change.
The 'Wichtiger Hinweis' info box added in Draft 177 (below 'Mein Hintergrund') remains in place.

constraints: Do not remove or reposition the 'Wichtiger Hinweis' info box that was added in the previous build.
Only modify the 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' section's formatting — do not alter content or other sections.
nonGoals: Changing any other sections on the About page.
Modifying backend logic or data models.
